title: Learning to Serve - Stories for the Whole Family by Bil Lepp and Antonio Sacre
podcast_name: The Apple Seed
summary: Gather your family for great stories from great storytellers about the act of giving and the act of being given to in times of need. Those acts can be some of the best moments for reflection and growth. (0:00) Introduction by host Sam Payne. (01:32) "Canned Beets and Peas" by Bil Lepp. A heartfelt story about how Bil first learned who the poor were and how his donations to his local canned food drives were forever changed. (14:10) "The Cheneys" by Sam Payne. A story about a time when Sam was asked to sing at the funeral of his former English professor. And how the stories told by other students during that funeral helped Sam remembered how this English professor opened his home to help struggling, far from home college students, including himself. (18:21) "A Mango in the Hand" by Antonio Sacre. A fictional story based on the real "dichos," or saying that Antonio's father would tell him, as well as the neighborhood where his grandmother lived and the mango tree in her backyard. Stories bring us together and the stories on The Apple Seed will spark memories that you can share with the people you love. The Apple Seed is a storytelling podcast by BYUradio and is hosted by Sam Payne. The Apple Seed is produced by Sam Payne, Wendy Folsom, and Brian Tanner. title: The Museum that was Lost in the Forest

summary: Three adventurous kidsвҖ”Maisy, Max, and LeoвҖ”ignore village warnings and explore the mysterious Grindlewood forest, where they stumble upon a hidden, ancient Museum of Marvels. title: Ep 1017. Marvelous Markers: a soothing bedtime story and relaxation

title: Raggedy Andy Gets Trapped
podcast_name: Stories Podcast: A Bedtime Show for Kids of All Ages
summary: Today we have another charming story about Raggedy Ann and Raggedy Andy written by Johnny Gruelle and adapted by Daniel Hinds. Follow along as Raggedy Andy gets trapped in the new shiny tin gutter when trying to find the Penny dolls. Can Raggedy Ann and the rest of Marcie's toys rescue them? Listen and find out! title: The Tale of Two bad Mice, by Beatrix Potter
podcast_name: LetвҖҷs Read With Lyla and Dad
summary: When two very bad mice find a dollhouse, they create mischief! Listen to loads more great stories & request one on our Patreon; patreon.com/letsreadwithlylaanddad Find us on Instagram @letsreadwithlylaanddad

title: Gloops Fighting Gloops Part 3: The Scepters Power
podcast_name: Kid Stories
summary: Archer leads his Desert Gloop army in a three-pronged assault on King Leon's castle to rescue Lucy the falcon. The battle erupts with gloops attacking the main gate, scaling the east wall, and infiltrating through the servant's entrance. Archer fights his way to Leon's tower bedroom and discovers a silver scepter with a red crystal - an artifact that can merge gloops with other creatures. This action-packed fantasy for kids ages 6-11 features epic battles, magical transformations, and a clever escape plan. Perfect for screen-free entertainment during bedtime and car rides. Let us know вңҚпёҸ Send Abbe a Message: Hi Abbe рҹ‘Ӣ вҖ” About Koala Moon рҹҗЁрҹҢ• Koala Moon is the beloved kids podcast that has become a treasured part of bedtime for families around the world. With over 50 million listens, itвҖҷs more than just a show, itвҖҷs a nightly ritual filled with wonder, calm, and connection. Each week, host Abbe Opher gently guides listeners through a new bedtime story, combining soothing narration, original storytelling, and tranquil soundscapes that support healthy sleep routines. These arenвҖҷt ordinary kids bedtime stories; they're immersive journeys into a cozy world of imagination, designed to help little ones relax, unwind, and fall asleep peacefully. Inside Sleepy Forest and beyond, youвҖҷll meet familiar friends like Koko the Koala, his adventurous sister Kira, the time-traveling pups Hector and Sunny, and many more. Whether itвҖҷs a short tale for busy evenings or a longer weekend wind-down, every episode is crafted to soothe and delight. And with gentle themes woven from nature, kindness, and curiosity, thereвҖҷs always something new to spark joy. ThatвҖҷs why our bedtime stories for kids continue to be loved by families who rely on them for calm, connection, and consistent bedtime routines. All of our bedtime stories for kids are written in-house and narrated with love, helping turn bedtime into something families look forward to. YouвҖҷll find kids sleep stories that inspire imagination and calm, while also supporting emotional growth and rest. Need help settling an energetic child? Or looking for a bedtime story that the whole family can enjoy together? Koala Moon delivers a weekly mix of cozy tales, quiet adventure, and familiar characters that make falling asleep feel easy. ItвҖҷs no wonder so many parents call it their favorite kids podcast for evening calm. With its unique blend of storytelling and mindfulness, Koala Moon brings a sense of peace into your home, one tale at a time. I'm Jim Jacob, a South Carolina based creator. I started as a podcaster by accident. Our first real episodes on the internet were me trying to find a solution to help tell my sons stories as I was traveling for work. I recorded some stories and hoped that by uploading them to a podcast app, my wife and kids could have easy access to listen. What started as a fix for our familyвҖҷs bedtime routine interruption has grown into a worldwide audience with hundreds of thousands of listeners. My wife Jocelyn and I have 3 kids and love inspiring others towards greater imagination and curiosity.  Welcome to "Kids Short Stories," the unique podcast where your child's imagination becomes the star of the show! Dive into a world of adventure, mystery, and fun as Mr. Jim brings to life exhilarating tales inspired by story ideas submitted by kids from around the globe. Whether your child dreams up a story about space-traveling aliens, underwater adventures, or magical forests, "Kids Short Stories" transforms their creative sparks into captivating audio experiences.  Each episode of "Kids Short Stories" is a new journey, tailor-made for young listeners who love to explore, learn, and imagine. With a special emphasis on kids' stories, this podcast is not just entertainmentвҖ”it's a platform where children's voices and ideas lead the narrative. Listen as kids' stories about heroes, mythical creatures, and everyday challenges come to life, fostering a love for storytelling and enhancing listening skills.  "Kids Short Stories" is more than just a podcast; it's a community where children are encouraged to be creative and where their stories are valued and celebrated. By focusing on kids' stories, we aim to inspire a generation of young thinkers, dreamers, and storytellers. Join Mr. Jim every week for a new, exciting kids' story that ignites imagination and brings joy and laughter into your child's world.  Parents and educators love "Kids Short Stories" for its commitment to delivering engaging, thoughtful, and age-appropriate content. Each kids' story is crafted with care, ensuring that it's not only entertaining but also educational. If you're looking for a podcast that enriches your child's day with fantastic kids' stories and a healthy dose of imagination, you've found the perfect listen with "Kids Short Stories."  Don't let your child's imaginative ideas stay untold! Tune in to "Kids Short Stories" and embark on a storytelling adventure where kids' stories come to life. title: Ep 540. Jungle Gym Joy: a calming bedtime story and meditation
podcast_name: Be Calm on Ahway Island Bedtime Stories
summary: Alice goes to the park and meets a new friend, Anora, who shows her how to have a great time playing on the jungle gym! Hello everyone!В  We hope you enjoyed our new stories this week. Now, welcome to Favorite Friday! Sometimes we like to listen to our favorites again. Please enjoy вҖңJungle Gym Joy,вҖқ and weвҖҷll be back with a new story on Monday! Narrator: Male Story Begins: 3:39 Jungle Gym Joy Excerpt: The sun was shining brightly on the twisty slide, and Alice decided she would play there first. Alice ran over to the slide, quickly moving up the steps. As she reached the top, Alice realized another girl was already there at the top. The other girl smiled and waved, giggling as she slid down the slide. Alice waited for the girl to reach the bottom and then she too slid down the slide, giggling as she went. Whee! Alice reached the bottom and hopped off the slide, but there was no sign of the little girl. Where did she go? Then Alice heard a giggle. She turned around and saw the little girl peeking from around the corner of the jungle gym. Alice decided to introduce herself. TodayвҖҷs Meditation: Love flows through you in this meditation as you imagine a baby fawn and mama deer. Looking for stories that emphasize acceptance, understanding, and empathy? YouвҖҷll find them on Ahway IslandВ®. Be Calm on Ahway IslandВ® Podcast offers original bedtime stories, like вҖңMagical Chair,вҖқ paired with meditations for kids. We help them drift off to sleep with a guided relaxation and a calming story. Gently nestled within each podcast episode are mindfulness techniques and positive learning moments. You can search for stories by Learning Message, Character Type, or Narrator Type on our Episodes page.вҖҜTo learn more about our mission at Ahway Island and our team, please visit our About page, or check out our FAQs. Creating the original bedtime stories and art for Be Calm on Ahway Island takes a lot of time and care. As a listener-supported podcast, we truly appreciate our members on Patreon. If youвҖҷre not already a member, please consider joining! Writing, recording, editing, and publishing episodes and managing digital platforms is an enormous endeavor. Our Patreon program will help continue to grow Ahway Island and we hope you will support us! You can choose from 2 different Membership Levels, all of which include access to our Archives and an extra episode each week! Are you and your children enjoying our stories and self-soothing meditations? We hope your child loved вҖңJungle Gym Joy.вҖқ We ask for your positive reviews to helpвҖҜothers find us, too! Please leave a 5-star review on your favorite podcast app (such as Apple Podcasts). And, please follow, like, and/or share our social media profiles (Facebook,вҖҜTwitter, Instagram ) to help us bring our original stories with positive messages to even more listeners! In the press: Digital Trends warns listeners that вҖңyou may not make it through an entire episode fully conscious.вҖқ Yay! WeвҖҷre honored that the website of Southwest Virginia Community Health Systems includes us on their list of Technology to Boost Mental Health. Jooki recommends us as an outstanding podcast for preschoolers. WeвҖҷre reaching listeners internationally! Sassy Mama Hong Kong included us in their article on transitioning into the new year, Sassy Mama Singapore recommends us for limiting screen-time while sheltering at home, and Haven Magazine Australia included us in their tips for getting through the school holidays. Thank you to Anne Bensfield and Pamela Rogers of School Library Journal for listing us as one of вҖң8 Podcasts To Encourage Mindfulness!вҖқ We hope you feel cozy and calm after listening to our story!

title: Fire Horse Year!
podcast_name: A story and a song: musical stories for children
summary: Send us a text It's the first Batt Cave of the New Year and the Batt Cave Team are Celebrating the coming Chinese New Year of The Fire Horse, beginning on Feb 17th. Batt Lamb is very excited! They also sing two songs. The first is a song to welcome a new ancestor building that Tanya and Pete have moved to their land. The second song is a well known Horse song fitting for the Fire Horse Year. Support the show You can find our audios and books to purchase at https://imagined-worlds.net/story-shop Or join the live monthly Batt Cave storytelling club at https://ko-fi.com/tanyabatt0027/tiers  Or if you are an educator for children 0 - 8 years subscribe to 'Batt on the Mat' - a monthly online, professional development storytelling and arts programme  https://imagined-worlds.net/batt-on-the-mat And finally, if you enjoyed our podcast, please share with friends and write a review. Or make a donation to support what we do here https://ko-fi.com/tanyabatt0027 Kia Ora!

title: Gloops Fighting Gloops Part 2: The Falcon of the Desert
podcast_name: Kid Stories
summary: Desert Gloop leader Archer meets Lucy, a peregrine falcon who fled to the desert mountains to escape King Leon's terrible fart smell. When Lucy offers to spy on the castle from above in exchange for a fart-free tower someday, an unlikely friendship is born. For six months, Lucy scouts the castle while Archer leads precision raids against Leon's guards. But when Leon realizes a falcon is feeding intelligence to his enemies, he builds a catapult designed to launch gloops into the air. This thrilling adventure for kids ages 6-11 features aerial espionage, strategic battles, and a rescue mission that changes everything. Perfect for screen-free entertainment during car rides. Series: Gloops Fighting Gloops | Episode 2 of 5 Advertising Inquiries: https://redcircle.com/brands Privacy & Opt-Out: https://redcircle.com/privacy

title: Buster Baxter, Cat Saver
podcast_name: The Arthur Podcast
summary: When a cat gets stuck in a tree, Buster Baxter saves the day! (Well, actually, the cat just wanted a taste of BusterвҖҷs Rocky Trout ice cream). The story of BusterвҖҷs вҖңheroicsвҖқ quickly spins out of control, and Arthur, for one, is sick of it!

title: Dora's Rainforest Train Adventure! | Ride & Sing
podcast_name: Nickelodeon Songs & Games
summary: All aboard the Rainforest Express with Dora, Boots, and DJ Emmanuel as they Ride and Sing to a party at Celebration Station! They come across all sorts of animals, such as spider monkeys, capybaras, and even elephants sleeping on the train tracks! With creative thinking and music, can you help wake up the elephants so Dora and her amigos can make it to the party?  Buckle up for Nickelodeon's Ride & Sing! Hop in and join your favorite Nick Jr. friends from PAW Patrol, Blaze, and Dora for music-filled adventures the whole family can enjoy. Each episode features travel-inspired songs that will turn car rides into sing-along journeys, taking you anywhere from the sea to outer space! Whether youвҖҷre in the car, at home, or on the go, every seat is the best seat for music, laughter, and big Nick Jr. fun.

title: Red Herring Reef Mystery  (T.A.L.E. Tour Rewind & Giveaway)
podcast_name: Dorktales Storytime
summary: Send us a text Jonathan and Redge plunge back into the Fantasea, when the magical minivan transformed into a submarine and carried them to the vibrant underwater village of Red Herring Reef. The adventure started as a dazzling tour of colorful coral and amazing art, until an empty frame led to an unexpected mystery to solve. As clues rippled to the surface, they discovered a special kind of magic hiding beneath the waves about finding the confidence to share who you are. title: Epic Ballads - Stories for the Whole Family by Charlotte Blake Alston and Josh Goforth
podcast_name: The Apple Seed
summary: Gather your family for great stories from great storytellers. This weeks' stories features traditional and modern ballads, one of the worldвҖҷs oldest storytelling forms, used for centuries to preserve epic events, big emotions, and pivotal moments in human history. (00:00) Introduction by host Sam Payne. (01:26) "Barbara Allen" by Josh Goforth. A traditional ballad, "Barbara Allen," which is more than 300 years old and reflects the enduring storytelling culture of the Appalachian region. (10:29) "Building a Doorway to Story," by Sam Payne. A story about when Sam and his siblings helped his dad build a special bookshelf, that held a record player. And how that record player helped him find the doorway to some of the great works of famous poets and musicians. (14:52) "Hammers of Steel - The Ballad of John Henry" by Charlotte Blake Alston. A powerful spoken ballad about the legendary American folk hero John Henry, who famously challenged a steam-powered machine in a battle of human strength versus modern technology. Stories bring us together and the stories on The Apple Seed will spark memories that you can share with the people you love. The Apple Seed is a storytelling podcast by BYUradio and is hosted by Sam Payne. The Apple Seed is produced by Sam Payne, Wendy Folsom, and Brian Tanner. Listen with no fees or subscriptions.вҖ”> Order Storybutton Today вҖ”Fun Activities To Do At Home After Listeninghttps://heymrjim.com/activities-for-kidsAbout Mr. Jim:  Hi! I'm Jim Jacob, a South Carolina based creator. I started as a podcaster by accident. Our first real episodes on the internet were me trying to find a solution to help tell my sons stories as I was traveling for work. I recorded some stories and hoped that by uploading them to a podcast app, my wife and kids could have easy access to listen. What started as a fix for our familyвҖҷs bedtime routine interruption has grown into a worldwide audience with hundreds of thousands of listeners. My wife Jocelyn and I have 3 kids and love inspiring others towards greater imagination and curiosity.  Welcome to "Kids Short Stories," the unique podcast where your child's imagination becomes the star of the show! Dive into a world of adventure, mystery, and fun as Mr. Jim brings to life exhilarating tales inspired by story ideas submitted by kids from around the globe. Whether your child dreams up a story about space-traveling aliens, underwater adventures, or magical forests, "Kids Short Stories" transforms their creative sparks into captivating audio experiences.  Each episode of "Kids Short Stories" is a new journey, tailor-made for young listeners who love to explore, learn, and imagine. With a special emphasis on kids' stories, this podcast is not just entertainmentвҖ”it's a platform where children's voices and ideas lead the narrative. Listen as kids' stories about heroes, mythical creatures, and everyday challenges come to life, fostering a love for storytelling and enhancing listening skills.  "Kids Short Stories" is more than just a podcast; it's a community where children are encouraged to be creative and where their stories are valued and celebrated. By focusing on kids' stories, we aim to inspire a generation of young thinkers, dreamers, and storytellers. Join Mr. Jim every week for a new, exciting kids' story that ignites imagination and brings joy and laughter into your child's world.  Parents and educators love "Kids Short Stories" for its commitment to delivering engaging, thoughtful, and age-appropriate content. Each kids' story is crafted with care, ensuring that it's not only entertaining but also educational. If you're looking for a podcast that enriches your child's day with fantastic kids' stories and a healthy dose of imagination, you've found the perfect listen with "Kids Short Stories."  Don't let your child's imaginative ideas stay untold! Tune in to "Kids Short Stories" and embark on a storytelling adventure where kids' stories come to life. Subscribe now and be part of a podcast that celebrates the power of children's creativity through mesmerizing kids' stories. title: River Goes to Space

summary: Parents!  Download Mr Jim's app Riffio to create your own stories and songs inside your favorite shows!  iOS DownloadВ  |В  Android  Listen to this podcast, audiobooks and more on Storybutton, without your kids needing to use a screened device or your phone. Listen with no fees or subscriptions.вҖ”> Order Storybutton Today вҖ”  Fun Activities To Do At Home After Listeninghttps://heymrjim.com/activities-for-kidsAbout Mr. Jim:  Hi! I'm Jim Jacob, a South Carolina based creator. I started as a podcaster by accident. Our first real episodes on the internet were me trying to find a solution to help tell my sons stories as I was traveling for work. I recorded some stories and hoped that by uploading them to a podcast app, my wife and kids could have easy access to listen. What started as a fix for our familyвҖҷs bedtime routine interruption has grown into a worldwide audience with hundreds of thousands of listeners. My wife Jocelyn and I have 3 kids and love inspiring others towards greater imagination and curiosity.  Welcome to "Kids Short Stories," the unique podcast where your child's imagination becomes the star of the show! Dive into a world of adventure, mystery, and fun as Mr. Jim brings to life exhilarating tales inspired by story ideas submitted by kids from around the globe. Whether your child dreams up a story about space-traveling aliens, underwater adventures, or magical forests, "Kids Short Stories" transforms their creative sparks into captivating audio experiences.  Each episode of "Kids Short Stories" is a new journey, tailor-made for young listeners who love to explore, learn, and imagine. With a special emphasis on kids' stories, this podcast is not just entertainmentвҖ”it's a platform where children's voices and ideas lead the narrative. Listen as kids' stories about heroes, mythical creatures, and everyday challenges come to life, fostering a love for storytelling and enhancing listening skills.  "Kids Short Stories" is more than just a podcast; it's a community where children are encouraged to be creative and where their stories are valued and celebrated. By focusing on kids' stories, we aim to inspire a generation of young thinkers, dreamers, and storytellers. Join Mr. Jim every week for a new, exciting kids' story that ignites imagination and brings joy and laughter into your child's world.  Parents and educators love "Kids Short Stories" for its commitment to delivering engaging, thoughtful, and age-appropriate content. Each kids' story is crafted with care, ensuring that it's not only entertaining but also educational. If you're looking for a podcast that enriches your child's day with fantastic kids' stories and a healthy dose of imagination, you've found the perfect listen with "Kids Short Stories."  Don't let your child's imaginative ideas stay untold! Tune in to "Kids Short Stories" and embark on a storytelling adventure where kids' stories come to life. Subscribe now and be part of a podcast that celebrates the power of children's creativity through mesmerizing kids' stories. title: Space Race

title: Gloops Fighting Gloops Part 1: The Origin of the Farting King
podcast_name: Kid Stories
summary: When a rebel gloop named Archer attempts to steal magical artifacts from King Leon's castle, everything goes wrong. The castle guards catch him mid-heist, and Archer barely escapes with a mysterious wooden crown. Now banished to the deadly desert where gloops normally dry out and die, Archer discovers the crown's magic has transformed him and his followers into something new.  This action-packed fantasy for kids ages 6-11 features magical artifacts, daring heists, and a cursed king who can't stop farting. Perfect for screen-free entertainment during car rides and bedtime. Series: Gloops Fighting Gloops | Episode 1 of 5 Advertising Inquiries: https://redcircle.com/brands Privacy & Opt-Out: https://redcircle.com/privacy

title: 'Odysseus Returns to Ithaca' as told by Nanny Piggins
podcast_name: Bedtime Stories with R.A. Spratt
summary: After 20 years away, Odysseus finally returns to Ithaca. But everyone there thinks she is dead and will kill her if they find out she's not, so Odysseus has to disguise herself as a beggar before she can return to the palace. title: Curtis and the Poison Dragon - Dragon Knights #16 - A Bedtime Story
podcast_name: DadвҖҷs Bedtime Stories For Kids
summary: As long as you are good with a swamp of poisonous gas being the main setting of a bedtime story - this episode could be for you! Phoenix comes from a long line of Nature Dragons. However, being hidden in a poisonous swamp somehow changed his powers.  After being discovered by Curtis - his Dragon Knight - Phoenix has to come to terms with his powers. Can he make something positive out of powers that seem so negative? Thank you to Curtis who suggested the poison dragon! About the Dragon Knights - In a world taken over by the Dragon King, the only hope is for a new group of dragon knights to find and link with dragon eggs. You happen to be one of those knights! Each dragon has a connection to an element, and each Dragon Knight can command that same element. title: Bonus - National Youth Storytellers

title: Katherine Johnson: The Moonshot Mathematician

ItвҖҷs based on the book series Good Night Stories for Rebel Girls. This episode was narrated by Nicole Pringle. It was written and produced by Danielle Roth, and edited by Haley Dapkus. Direction by Ashton Carter. Sound design and mixing by Carter Wogahn.  Fact checking by Sam Gebauer. Our production coordinator was Natalie Hara. Haley Dapkus was our senior producer. Our executive producers were Anjelika Temple and Jes Wolfe.Original theme music was composed and performed by Elettra Bargiacchi.A special thanks to the whole Rebel Girls team, who make this podcast possible! Until next time, stay rebel!

summary: Parents! Listen with no fees or subscriptions.вҖ”> Order Storybutton Today вҖ”  Fun Activities To Do At Home After Listeninghttps://heymrjim.com/activities-for-kidsAbout Mr. Jim:  Hi! I'm Jim Jacob, a South Carolina based creator. I started as a podcaster by accident. Our first real episodes on the internet were me trying to find a solution to help tell my sons stories as I was traveling for work. I recorded some stories and hoped that by uploading them to a podcast app, my wife and kids could have easy access to listen. What started as a fix for our familyвҖҷs bedtime routine interruption has grown into a worldwide audience with hundreds of thousands of listeners. My wife Jocelyn and I have 3 kids and love inspiring others towards greater imagination and curiosity.  Welcome to "Kids Short Stories," the unique podcast where your child's imagination becomes the star of the show! Dive into a world of adventure, mystery, and fun as Mr. Jim brings to life exhilarating tales inspired by story ideas submitted by kids from around the globe. Whether your child dreams up a story about space-traveling aliens, underwater adventures, or magical forests, "Kids Short Stories" transforms their creative sparks into captivating audio experiences.  Each episode of "Kids Short Stories" is a new journey, tailor-made for young listeners who love to explore, learn, and imagine. With a special emphasis on kids' stories, this podcast is not just entertainmentвҖ”it's a platform where children's voices and ideas lead the narrative. Listen as kids' stories about heroes, mythical creatures, and everyday challenges come to life, fostering a love for storytelling and enhancing listening skills.  "Kids Short Stories" is more than just a podcast; it's a community where children are encouraged to be creative and where their stories are valued and celebrated. By focusing on kids' stories, we aim to inspire a generation of young thinkers, dreamers, and storytellers. Join Mr. Jim every week for a new, exciting kids' story that ignites imagination and brings joy and laughter into your child's world.  Parents and educators love "Kids Short Stories" for its commitment to delivering engaging, thoughtful, and age-appropriate content. Each kids' story is crafted with care, ensuring that it's not only entertaining but also educational. If you're looking for a podcast that enriches your child's day with fantastic kids' stories and a healthy dose of imagination, you've found the perfect listen with "Kids Short Stories."  Don't let your child's imaginative ideas stay untold! Tune in to "Kids Short Stories" and embark on a storytelling adventure where kids' stories come to life. Subscribe now and be part of a podcast that celebrates the power of children's creativity through mesmerizing kids' stories. Listen with no fees or subscriptions.вҖ”> Order Storybutton Today вҖ”  Fun Activities To Do At Home After Listeninghttps://heymrjim.com/activities-for-kidsAbout Mr. Jim:  Hi! I'm Jim Jacob, a South Carolina based creator. I started as a podcaster by accident. Our first real episodes on the internet were me trying to find a solution to help tell my sons stories as I was traveling for work. I recorded some stories and hoped that by uploading them to a podcast app, my wife and kids could have easy access to listen. What started as a fix for our familyвҖҷs bedtime routine interruption has grown into a worldwide audience with hundreds of thousands of listeners. My wife Jocelyn and I have 3 kids and love inspiring others towards greater imagination and curiosity.  Welcome to "Kids Short Stories," the unique podcast where your child's imagination becomes the star of the show! Dive into a world of adventure, mystery, and fun as Mr. Jim brings to life exhilarating tales inspired by story ideas submitted by kids from around the globe. Whether your child dreams up a story about space-traveling aliens, underwater adventures, or magical forests, "Kids Short Stories" transforms their creative sparks into captivating audio experiences.  Each episode of "Kids Short Stories" is a new journey, tailor-made for young listeners who love to explore, learn, and imagine. With a special emphasis on kids' stories, this podcast is not just entertainmentвҖ”it's a platform where children's voices and ideas lead the narrative. Listen as kids' stories about heroes, mythical creatures, and everyday challenges come to life, fostering a love for storytelling and enhancing listening skills.  "Kids Short Stories" is more than just a podcast; it's a community where children are encouraged to be creative and where their stories are valued and celebrated. By focusing on kids' stories, we aim to inspire a generation of young thinkers, dreamers, and storytellers. Join Mr. Jim every week for a new, exciting kids' story that ignites imagination and brings joy and laughter into your child's world.  Parents and educators love "Kids Short Stories" for its commitment to delivering engaging, thoughtful, and age-appropriate content. Each kids' story is crafted with care, ensuring that it's not only entertaining but also educational. If you're looking for a podcast that enriches your child's day with fantastic kids' stories and a healthy dose of imagination, you've found the perfect listen with "Kids Short Stories."  Don't let your child's imaginative ideas stay untold! Tune in to "Kids Short Stories" and embark on a storytelling adventure where kids' stories come to life. Subscribe now and be part of a podcast that celebrates the power of children's creativity through mesmerizing kids' stories. title: What Scared Sue Ellen
podcast_name: The Arthur Podcast
summary: Sue Ellen says sheвҖҷs not afraid of anythingвҖҰthat is until she hears a creepy howling noise in the woods. Arthur, Binky, and Buster join her on a mission to discover whatвҖҷs behind the mysterious howls!

title: Blaze's Racing Day Adventure! | Ride & Sing
podcast_name: Nickelodeon Songs & Games
summary: Come along with Blaze, AJ, and DJ Emmanuel as they Ride and Sing to the finish line of a Monster Machine Race! They jump over chomping alligators and zoom through loop-de-loops, but when Crusher spills oil all over the racetrack, they'll need YOUR help! With blazing speed and bopping tunes, can you help our heroes win the race? On your mark, get set, GO!  Buckle up for Nickelodeon's Ride & Sing! Hop in and join your favorite Nick Jr. friends from PAW Patrol, Blaze, and Dora for music-filled adventures the whole family can enjoy. Each episode features travel-inspired songs that will turn car rides into sing-along journeys, taking you anywhere from the sea to outer space! Whether youвҖҷre in the car, at home, or on the go, every seat is the best seat for music, laughter, and big Nick Jr. fun.

title: Family Drama - Stories for the Whole Family by Donna Washington and Bill Harley
podcast_name: The Apple Seed
summary: Gather your family for great stories from great storytellers about how catastrophizing everyday problems can turn simple disagreements into lasting conflicts and how self-awareness can be the solution. (00:00) Intro by host Sam Payne. (01:14) "Bastianello" by Donna Washington. A humorous story in which a newly married couple and their in-laws become consumed by a problem that hasnвҖҷt yet occurred. As conflict escalate, the story reveals how catastrophic thinking can complicate situations that might otherwise be easily resolved. (15:28) "Calls with Mom" by Sam Payne. A story about the conversations Sam's wife has with their daughter when she is paralyzed with worry, and the questions that help his daughter become proactive with her fears. (19:13) "Is Not Is Too" - Bill Harley tells a a witty a song about siblings locked in a cycle of constant disagreement. Each is convinced the other is the problem, and the ongoing conflict illustrates how an unwillingness to share responsibility can prevent even simple disputes from being resolved. Stories bring us together and the stories on The Apple Seed will spark memories that you can share with the people you love. The Apple Seed is a storytelling podcast by BYUradio and is hosted by Sam Payne. The Apple Seed is produced by Sam Payne, Wendy Folsom, and Brian Tanner.  Assistant Producers - Madie Clasby, Keri Griggs, Paige Jensen-Rutter, and Kay Hendrickson Post-Production Supervisor - Trent Reimschussel Editor - Madie Clasby Audiovisual Technician - Kiplin Merrill Post-Production Audio Engineers - Taehyeon Ted Kim and Kiplin Merril

title: рҹҡўвңЁ Parcels and Pirates вңЁрҹҡў

title: Grace and The Tree Traps| Part 2
podcast_name: Kids Short Stories: a Bedtime Show By Mr Jim
summary: Parents!Listen to this podcast, audiobooks and more on Storybutton, without your kids needing to use a screened device or your phone. Listen with no fees or subscriptions.вҖ”> Order Storybutton Today вҖ”  Fun Activities To Do At Home After Listeninghttps://heymrjim.com/activities-for-kidsAbout Mr. Jim:  Hi! I'm Jim Jacob, a South Carolina based creator. I started as a podcaster by accident. Our first real episodes on the internet were me trying to find a solution to help tell my sons stories as I was traveling for work. I recorded some stories and hoped that by uploading them to a podcast app, my wife and kids could have easy access to listen. What started as a fix for our familyвҖҷs bedtime routine interruption has grown into a worldwide audience with hundreds of thousands of listeners. My wife Jocelyn and I have 3 kids and love inspiring others towards greater imagination and curiosity.  Welcome to "Kids Short Stories," the unique podcast where your child's imagination becomes the star of the show! Dive into a world of adventure, mystery, and fun as Mr. Jim brings to life exhilarating tales inspired by story ideas submitted by kids from around the globe. Whether your child dreams up a story about space-traveling aliens, underwater adventures, or magical forests, "Kids Short Stories" transforms their creative sparks into captivating audio experiences.  Each episode of "Kids Short Stories" is a new journey, tailor-made for young listeners who love to explore, learn, and imagine. With a special emphasis on kids' stories, this podcast is not just entertainmentвҖ”it's a platform where children's voices and ideas lead the narrative. Listen as kids' stories about heroes, mythical creatures, and everyday challenges come to life, fostering a love for storytelling and enhancing listening skills.  "Kids Short Stories" is more than just a podcast; it's a community where children are encouraged to be creative and where their stories are valued and celebrated. By focusing on kids' stories, we aim to inspire a generation of young thinkers, dreamers, and storytellers. Join Mr. Jim every week for a new, exciting kids' story that ignites imagination and brings joy and laughter into your child's world.  Parents and educators love "Kids Short Stories" for its commitment to delivering engaging, thoughtful, and age-appropriate content. Each kids' story is crafted with care, ensuring that it's not only entertaining but also educational. If you're looking for a podcast that enriches your child's day with fantastic kids' stories and a healthy dose of imagination, you've found the perfect listen with "Kids Short Stories."  Don't let your child's imaginative ideas stay untold! Tune in to "Kids Short Stories" and embark on a storytelling adventure where kids' stories come to life. Subscribe now and be part of a podcast that celebrates the power of children's creativity through mesmerizing kids' stories. title: Tereza Lee: Dreamers In Action
podcast_name: Good Night Stories for Rebel Girls
summary: Often described as the вҖңoriginal DREAMer,вҖқ Tereza Lee is an activist and musician who bravely stepped out of the shadows to share her story as a young undocumented immigrant in the United States. Although the U.S. Congress has yet to pass the DREAM Act, which would offer protections for undocumented youth, TerezaвҖҷs decision to tell the world her story helped build a national movement for undocumented youthвҖ”and launched Tereza into a life of activism that continues to this day. About the Narrator Laurene Powell Jobs is founder and president of Emerson Collective. EmersonвҖҷs mission centers on advancing immigration policies, preserving the environment, re-envisioning the future of high school, and ending gun violence in Chicago. Powell Jobs serves as board chair of The XQ Institute and College Track, a college completion program she founded in 1997 to combat the alarming achievement gap among students of color. В  Credits This podcast is a production of Rebel Girls and Boom Integrated, a division of John Marshall Media. ItвҖҷs based on the book series Good Night Stories for Rebel Girls. Our Executive Producers are Jes Wolfe and Katie Sprenger. This season was produced by John Marshall Cheary, Sarah Storm, and Robin Lai. Corinne Peterson is our Production Manager. This episode was written by Alexis Stratton and edited by Maithy Vu. Proofread by Ariana Rosas. Original theme music was composed and performed by Elettra Bargiacchi who has also sound designed this episode. Mattia Marcelli was the sound mixer. [This episode previously aired in 2020.]

summary: Parents!Listen to this podcast, audiobooks and more on Storybutton, without your kids needing to use a screened device or your phone. Listen with no fees or subscriptions.вҖ”> Order Storybutton Today вҖ”  Fun Activities To Do At Home After Listeninghttps://heymrjim.com/activities-for-kidsAbout Mr. Jim:  Hi! I'm Jim Jacob, a South Carolina based creator. I started as a podcaster by accident. Our first real episodes on the internet were me trying to find a solution to help tell my sons stories as I was traveling for work. I recorded some stories and hoped that by uploading them to a podcast app, my wife and kids could have easy access to listen. What started as a fix for our familyвҖҷs bedtime routine interruption has grown into a worldwide audience with hundreds of thousands of listeners. My wife Jocelyn and I have 3 kids and love inspiring others towards greater imagination and curiosity.  Welcome to "Kids Short Stories," the unique podcast where your child's imagination becomes the star of the show! Dive into a world of adventure, mystery, and fun as Mr. Jim brings to life exhilarating tales inspired by story ideas submitted by kids from around the globe. Whether your child dreams up a story about space-traveling aliens, underwater adventures, or magical forests, "Kids Short Stories" transforms their creative sparks into captivating audio experiences.  Each episode of "Kids Short Stories" is a new journey, tailor-made for young listeners who love to explore, learn, and imagine. With a special emphasis on kids' stories, this podcast is not just entertainmentвҖ”it's a platform where children's voices and ideas lead the narrative. Listen as kids' stories about heroes, mythical creatures, and everyday challenges come to life, fostering a love for storytelling and enhancing listening skills.  "Kids Short Stories" is more than just a podcast; it's a community where children are encouraged to be creative and where their stories are valued and celebrated. By focusing on kids' stories, we aim to inspire a generation of young thinkers, dreamers, and storytellers. Join Mr. Jim every week for a new, exciting kids' story that ignites imagination and brings joy and laughter into your child's world.  Parents and educators love "Kids Short Stories" for its commitment to delivering engaging, thoughtful, and age-appropriate content. Each kids' story is crafted with care, ensuring that it's not only entertaining but also educational. If you're looking for a podcast that enriches your child's day with fantastic kids' stories and a healthy dose of imagination, you've found the perfect listen with "Kids Short Stories."  Don't let your child's imaginative ideas stay untold! Tune in to "Kids Short Stories" and embark on a storytelling adventure where kids' stories come to life. Subscribe now and be part of a podcast that celebrates the power of children's creativity through mesmerizing kids' stories. summary: Arthur has to write a story for a school assignment, but heвҖҷs convinced that his ordinary life is just too boring. How can he possibly make the tale of how he got his dog Pal exciting? Maybe a few dancing elephants in outer space will do the trick!

title: PAW Patrol Marshall's Farm Rescue Adventure! | Ride & Sing
podcast_name: Nickelodeon Songs & Games
summary: Yeehaw! PAW Patrol Marshall and DJ Emmanuel take a ride in Marshall's fire truck and head to a barnyard dance party! But what happens when Fluffy the Sheep gets lost? On their rescue mission, the PAW Patrol encounter barking snapdragon flowers, a giant corn maze, and more! Buckle up for Nickelodeon's Ride & Sing! Hop in and join your favorite Nick Jr. friends from PAW Patrol, Blaze, and Dora for music-filled adventures the whole family can enjoy. Each episode features travel-inspired songs that will turn car rides into sing-along journeys, taking you anywhere from the sea to outer space! Whether youвҖҷre in the car, at home, or on the go, every seat is the best seat for music, laughter, and big Nick Jr. fun.

title: Stories That Heal - Stories for the Whole Family by Alton Takiyama-Chung and Dovie Thomason
podcast_name: The Apple Seed
summary: Gather your family for great stories from great storytellers that explore healing from grief and trauma through storytelling, showing how stories can restore, connect, and bring meaning long after painful experiences. (01:38) "The Twice Saved Life" - Alton Takiyama-Chung shares a powerful true story from history. He recounts the life of Solly Gaynor, a young Jewish boy who survived the Holocaust and later found healing from the trauma decades after the horrific events by meeting the Japanese man who saved him and by sharing his story. (10:43) Sam tells a heartfelt story about about how a story can ripple forward through the years. While moving 50 miles away on his own, Sam experienced a moment that later returned unexpectedly, blessing his life and reminding him of the enduring impact of kindness. (16:23) "The Story Stone" - Dovie Thomason tells an ancient Haudenosaunee story about a grieving young boy. Through learning, carrying, and sharing stories, the boy begins to heal, illustrating how traditional storytelling has long been a pathway to emotional healing and wisdom. Stories bring us together and the stories on The Apple Seed will spark memories that you can share with the people you love. The Apple Seed is a storytelling podcast by BYUradio and is hosted by Sam Payne. The Apple Seed is produced by Sam Payne, Wendy Folsom, and Brian Tanner. Assistant Producers Madie Clasby, Keri Griggs, Paige Jensen-Rutter, and Kay Hendrickson. Post-Production Supervisor Trent Reimschussel. Editor Madie Clasby. Production Audiovisual Technician DJ Cromarty. Post-Production Audio Engineers Taehyeon Ted Kim and Kiplin Merril.

title: Skeleton and Cat Part 5 - The Tortoise Shell House
podcast_name: Kid Stories
summary: Skeleton and Cat follow their magical compass through rain-soaked forests, encounter a merchant selling bottled memories, and discover a man cursed to wake up in a giant tortoise shell every morning. In this imaginative fantasy podcast for kids ages 6-11, our heroes meet a mysterious traveling merchant who offers to bottle and sell experiencesвҖ”everything from first snowfall to the taste of warm apple pie. When Skeleton considers trading his memory of meeting Cat for a chance at remembering who he was, Cat helps him realize some memories are too valuable to lose. Seeking shelter from a thunderstorm, they stumble into an enormous empty tortoise shell and meet Turl, a kind old man trapped by an ancient curse that teleports him back to the shell every single morning, no matter where he falls asleep.  Perfect for bedtime and car rides, this heartwarming kids adventure story delivers weird magic, tough choices about what makes us who we are, and the beginning of a real friendship that kids ages 6-11 will love. From iconic songs to the Rock and Roll Hall of Fame, Nina SimoneвҖҷs voice still echoes in the world. This podcast is a production of Rebel Girls. ItвҖҷs based on the book series Good Night Stories for Rebel Girls. This episode was narrated by DJ Switch Ghana. Fact checking by Lauren Brown West-Rosenthal. Project coordination by Natalie Hara. Our executive producers were Anjelika Temple and Jes Wolfe. Original theme music was composed and performed by Elettra Bargiacchi. A special thanks to the whole Rebel Girls team, who make this podcast possible! Until next time, stay rebel!

I'm Jim Jacob, a South Carolina based creator. I started as a podcaster by accident. Our first real episodes on the internet were me trying to find a solution to help tell my sons stories as I was traveling for work. I recorded some stories and hoped that by uploading them to a podcast app, my wife and kids could have easy access to listen. What started as a fix for our familyвҖҷs bedtime routine interruption has grown into a worldwide audience with hundreds of thousands of listeners. My wife Jocelyn and I have 3 kids and love inspiring others towards greater imagination and curiosity.  Welcome to "Kids Short Stories," the unique podcast where your child's imagination becomes the star of the show! Dive into a world of adventure, mystery, and fun as Mr. Jim brings to life exhilarating tales inspired by story ideas submitted by kids from around the globe. Whether your child dreams up a story about space-traveling aliens, underwater adventures, or magical forests, "Kids Short Stories" transforms their creative sparks into captivating audio experiences.  Each episode of "Kids Short Stories" is a new journey, tailor-made for young listeners who love to explore, learn, and imagine. With a special emphasis on kids' stories, this podcast is not just entertainmentвҖ”it's a platform where children's voices and ideas lead the narrative. Listen as kids' stories about heroes, mythical creatures, and everyday challenges come to life, fostering a love for storytelling and enhancing listening skills.  "Kids Short Stories" is more than just a podcast; it's a community where children are encouraged to be creative and where their stories are valued and celebrated. By focusing on kids' stories, we aim to inspire a generation of young thinkers, dreamers, and storytellers. Join Mr. Jim every week for a new, exciting kids' story that ignites imagination and brings joy and laughter into your child's world.  Parents and educators love "Kids Short Stories" for its commitment to delivering engaging, thoughtful, and age-appropriate content. Each kids' story is crafted with care, ensuring that it's not only entertaining but also educational. If you're looking for a podcast that enriches your child's day with fantastic kids' stories and a healthy dose of imagination, you've found the perfect listen with "Kids Short Stories."  Don't let your child's imaginative ideas stay untold! Tune in to "Kids Short Stories" and embark on a storytelling adventure where kids' stories come to life. Subscribe now and be part of a podcast that celebrates the power of children's creativity through mesmerizing kids' stories. title: Dexter and Oliver's Marshmellow Volcano| Part 1
podcast_name: Kids Short Stories: a Bedtime Show By Mr Jim
summary: Parents!Listen to this podcast, audiobooks and more on Storybutton, without your kids needing to use a screened device or your phone. Listen with no fees or subscriptions.вҖ”> Order Storybutton Today вҖ”  Fun Activities To Do At Home After Listeninghttps://heymrjim.com/activities-for-kidsAbout Mr. Jim:  Hi! I'm Jim Jacob, a South Carolina based creator. I started as a podcaster by accident. Our first real episodes on the internet were me trying to find a solution to help tell my sons stories as I was traveling for work. I recorded some stories and hoped that by uploading them to a podcast app, my wife and kids could have easy access to listen. What started as a fix for our familyвҖҷs bedtime routine interruption has grown into a worldwide audience with hundreds of thousands of listeners. My wife Jocelyn and I have 3 kids and love inspiring others towards greater imagination and curiosity.  Welcome to "Kids Short Stories," the unique podcast where your child's imagination becomes the star of the show! Dive into a world of adventure, mystery, and fun as Mr. Jim brings to life exhilarating tales inspired by story ideas submitted by kids from around the globe. Whether your child dreams up a story about space-traveling aliens, underwater adventures, or magical forests, "Kids Short Stories" transforms their creative sparks into captivating audio experiences.  Each episode of "Kids Short Stories" is a new journey, tailor-made for young listeners who love to explore, learn, and imagine. With a special emphasis on kids' stories, this podcast is not just entertainmentвҖ”it's a platform where children's voices and ideas lead the narrative. Listen as kids' stories about heroes, mythical creatures, and everyday challenges come to life, fostering a love for storytelling and enhancing listening skills.  "Kids Short Stories" is more than just a podcast; it's a community where children are encouraged to be creative and where their stories are valued and celebrated. By focusing on kids' stories, we aim to inspire a generation of young thinkers, dreamers, and storytellers. Join Mr. Jim every week for a new, exciting kids' story that ignites imagination and brings joy and laughter into your child's world.  Parents and educators love "Kids Short Stories" for its commitment to delivering engaging, thoughtful, and age-appropriate content. Each kids' story is crafted with care, ensuring that it's not only entertaining but also educational. If you're looking for a podcast that enriches your child's day with fantastic kids' stories and a healthy dose of imagination, you've found the perfect listen with "Kids Short Stories."  Don't let your child's imaginative ideas stay untold! Tune in to "Kids Short Stories" and embark on a storytelling adventure where kids' stories come to life. Subscribe now and be part of a podcast that celebrates the power of children's creativity through mesmerizing kids' stories. title: Tatterhood

summary: Hop on the Rainforest Bus to the Jungle Jamboree with Dora, Boots, and DJ Emmanuel! Whether youвҖҷre in the car, at home, or on the go, every seat is the best seat for music, laughter, and big Nick Jr. fun.

title: Pulling Your Leg - Stories for the Whole Family by Geraldine Buckley and Tim Lowry
podcast_name: The Apple Seed
summary: Gather your family for great stories from great storytellers about practical jokes, misunderstandings, and mishaps that turn into lasting family memories. (01:20) "Damien's Limp" - Geraldine Buckley tells a funny and surprising childhood story about her jokester brother who loved to torment her, until one day he began limping and a doctor feared he might have polio, leading to an unexpected turn. (17:57) Sam tells a story about his siblings and how they never stop teasing and poking fun at one another, no matter how old they get. (21:29) "Three Cowboys" - Tim Lowry tells a humorous campfire story about three cowboys reminiscing about the comforts of home, which leads them into a lively conversation about ridiculous and unforgettable pets. Stories bring us together and the stories on The Apple Seed will spark memories that you can share with the people you love. The Apple Seed is a storytelling podcast by BYUradio and is hosted by Sam Payne. The Apple Seed is produced by Sam Payne, Wendy Folsom, and Brian Tanner. Assistant Producers Madie Clasby, Garrett Gunnell, Keri Griggs, Paige Jensen-Rutter, and Kay Hendrickson. Post-Production Supervisor Trent Reimschussel. Editor Madie Clasby. Production Audiovisual Technician DJ Cromarty. Post-Production Audio Engineers Taehyeon Ted Kim and Kiplin Merril.

title: Growing Up, Friendship and Big Feelings рҹҢұрҹӨқ
podcast_name: Fun Kids Book Worms
summary: Welcome to the latest episode of Book Quest!  This weekвҖҷs episode is all about growing up, with all its big emotions, brilliant friendships, and moments of not quite knowing where you fit yet.  WeвҖҷre joined by Katya Balen, who tells us all about her brand-new book Letters from the Upside: Callie Chaos, a story packed with heart, humour, and the wonderfully complicated business of figuring yourself out.  Then, we slow things down with Robin by Sarah Ann Juckes, a quiet but powerful story exploring friendship, fear, and what itвҖҷs like when youвҖҷre trying to make sense of the world without having all the answers.  That's all on this week's episode of Fun Kids Book Quest! Join Fun Kids Podcasts+: https://funkidslive.com/plus See omnystudio.com/listener for privacy information.

title: Marushka and the New Year
podcast_name: Stories Podcast: A Bedtime Show for Kids of All Ages
summary: Today's Episode is a Czech fairy tale, all about a girl named Marushka who lives a tough life with her sister and step-mother. She is not treated very well by either, but on a cold winter day, while out on an errand for her sister she stumbles upon something magical. What started as a fix for our familyвҖҷs bedtime routine interruption has grown into a worldwide audience with hundreds of thousands of listeners. My wife Jocelyn and I have 3 kids and love inspiring others towards greater imagination and curiosity.  Welcome to "Kids Animal Stories," the captivating kids podcast where education meets entertainment through the exploration of the animal kingdom. Hosted by the engaging Mr. Jim, this show takes young listeners on thrilling adventures into the wild, diving deep into the lives of animals from every corner of the globe. Each episode of this kids podcast is a journey, rich with learning opportunities and fun facts that spark curiosity and foster a love for nature.  "Kids Animal Stories" is the perfect kids podcast for young animal enthusiasts eager to learn about the natural world. Through immersive storytelling, Mr. Jim brings to life the fascinating behaviors, habitats, and conservation stories of animals, making each episode an educational expedition. With a focus on being a kids podcast, it provides a platform where children can not only listen but also engage with the content, learning about the environment and the importance of caring for our planet.  As a leading kids podcast in the realm of educational entertainment, "Kids Animal Stories" combines factual information with engaging narratives, making learning about animals exciting and memorable. Whether your child is interested in the deep sea, the jungle, or their own backyard, this kids podcast delivers stories that captivate and educate, sparking a lifelong interest in wildlife and conservation.  Parents and educators value "Kids Animal Stories" as a resourceful kids podcast that complements learning with fun. Each episode is thoughtfully crafted, ensuring that the content is not only informative but also suitable for children of all ages. As a trusted kids podcast, it's an excellent way for children to expand their knowledge and understanding of the world around them, all through the power of storytelling.  Subscribe to "Kids Animal Stories" and join Mr. Jim on this exciting kids podcast, where each episode is an adventure waiting to happen. Ignite your child's passion for learning and their love for animals with this engaging kids podcast, where every story is an opportunity to learn something new about our planet's incredible wildlife. "Kids Animal Stories" is more than just a kids podcastвҖ”it's a window to the world, opening young minds to the wonders of the animal kingdom, one story at a time. title: Camp Christmas - Campamento de Navidad (Updated)
podcast_name: Bash & Mila: A Bilingual Kids Podcast in English & Spanish
summary: Send us a text Episode 11: Camp Christmas рҹҺ„вңЁ Bash and Mila wake up to the very best kind of advent surprise: today is Camp Christmas! With hot chocolate on their minds, Sir Douglas the talking tree waiting to say hello, and the Giving Tree calling their names, the whole family bundles up for a magical night full of lights, laughter, and holiday wonder. As they prepare their gifts for the Giving Tree, Bash confidently fills a box with monster trucks, ready to make another kid smile. Mila, though, faces a harder choice. One of her most beloved stuffies, Snow Cone, might be ready for a new homeвҖҰ but letting go isnвҖҷt easy. With gentle encouragement from Mom, Dad, and Bash, Mila discovers that sharing something you love can be just as meaningful as holding on. From a twinkly hay ride through the camp to spotting Christmas dinosaurs, laser-tag snowstorms, and handmade ornaments swaying in the winter breeze, the night unfolds with warmth and magic. And when Mila finally finds the perfect match for Snow Cone at the Giving Tree, the true spirit of the season shines bright. By the end of the night (hands wrapped around real hot chocolate) Bash and Mila learn that the most special gifts arenвҖҷt always the ones we receiveвҖҰtheyвҖҷre the ones we share. вңЁ Bilingual (English + Spanish) and perfect for ages 0вҖ“8+, Camp Christmas is a cozy holiday episode about generosity, empathy, and the quiet magic that comes from giving with your whole heartвҖ”wrapped in twinkling lights, family laughter, and Christmas cheer. -- Episodio 11: Campamento de Navidad рҹҺ„вңЁ Bash y Mila despiertan con la mejor sorpresa del calendario de adviento: ВЎhoy es Campamento de Navidad! Con el chocolate caliente en la mente, Sir Douglas (el ГЎrbol que habla) esperГЎndolos, y el ГҒrbol Generoso llamando sus nombres, toda la familia se abriga y sale rumbo a una noche mГЎgica llena de luces, risas y espГӯritu navideГұo. Mientras preparan sus regalos para el ГҒrbol Generoso, Bash llena con seguridad una caja de camiones monstruo, listo para hacer sonreГӯr a otro niГұo. Mila, en cambio, enfrenta una decisiГіn mГЎs difГӯcil. Uno de sus peluches mГЎs queridos, Snow Cone, podrГӯa estar listo para un nuevo hogarвҖҰ pero dejarlo ir no es fГЎcil. Con el apoyo cariГұoso de MamГЎ, PapГЎ y Bash, Mila descubre que compartir algo que amas puede ser tan especial como conservarlo. Desde un paseo en heno lleno de luces hasta dinosaurios navideГұos, tormentas de lГЎser con nieve y adornos hechos a mano que se mecen suavemente con la brisa invernal, la noche se llena de magia y calidez. Y cuando Mila encuentra la combinaciГіn perfecta para Snow Cone en el ГҒrbol Generoso, el verdadero espГӯritu de la Navidad brilla con fuerza. Al final de la noche (con las manos rodeando una taza de chocolate caliente de verdad) Bash y Mila aprenden que los regalos mГЎs especiales no siempre son los que recibimosвҖҰsino los que compartimos. вңЁ BilingГјe (inglГ©s y espaГұol) y perfecto para niГұas y niГұos de 0 a 8 aГұos, Campamento de Navidad es un episodio navideГұo acogedor sobre la generosidad, la empatГӯa y la magia silenciosa que nace al dar con todo el corazГіnвҖ”envuelto en luces brillantes, risas familiares y alegrГӯa navideГұa. рҹҺ§ DonвҖҷt forget to follow and leave a review if you loved the episode!  Thanks for laughing, learning, and growing with us, we're so glad you're here.  Connect with Bash & Mila  рҹ“ё Instagram: @bashandmila  рҹҺө TikTok: @bashandmila  рҹҢҗ Website: www.bashandmila.com

title: Adie and June's Car Alarm| Part 1
podcast_name: Kids Short Stories: a Bedtime Show By Mr Jim
summary: Parents!Listen to this podcast, audiobooks and more on Storybutton, without your kids needing to use a screened device or your phone. Listen with no fees or subscriptions.вҖ”> Order Storybutton Today вҖ”  Sign Up For Kid Shout OutвҖҷs and Story SubmissionвҖҷshttps://heymrjim.com/story-submissionsFun Activities To Do At Home After Listeninghttps://heymrjim.com/activities-for-kidsAbout Mr. Jim:  Hi! I'm Jim Jacob, a South Carolina based creator. I started as a podcaster by accident. Our first real episodes on the internet were me trying to find a solution to help tell my sons stories as I was traveling for work. I recorded some stories and hoped that by uploading them to a podcast app, my wife and kids could have easy access to listen. What started as a fix for our familyвҖҷs bedtime routine interruption has grown into a worldwide audience with hundreds of thousands of listeners. My wife Jocelyn and I have 3 kids and love inspiring others towards greater imagination and curiosity.  Welcome to "Kids Short Stories," the unique podcast where your child's imagination becomes the star of the show! Dive into a world of adventure, mystery, and fun as Mr. Jim brings to life exhilarating tales inspired by story ideas submitted by kids from around the globe. Whether your child dreams up a story about space-traveling aliens, underwater adventures, or magical forests, "Kids Short Stories" transforms their creative sparks into captivating audio experiences.  Each episode of "Kids Short Stories" is a new journey, tailor-made for young listeners who love to explore, learn, and imagine. With a special emphasis on kids' stories, this podcast is not just entertainmentвҖ”it's a platform where children's voices and ideas lead the narrative. Listen as kids' stories about heroes, mythical creatures, and everyday challenges come to life, fostering a love for storytelling and enhancing listening skills.  "Kids Short Stories" is more than just a podcast; it's a community where children are encouraged to be creative and where their stories are valued and celebrated. By focusing on kids' stories, we aim to inspire a generation of young thinkers, dreamers, and storytellers. Join Mr. Jim every week for a new, exciting kids' story that ignites imagination and brings joy and laughter into your child's world.  Parents and educators love "Kids Short Stories" for its commitment to delivering engaging, thoughtful, and age-appropriate content. Each kids' story is crafted with care, ensuring that it's not only entertaining but also educational. If you're looking for a podcast that enriches your child's day with fantastic kids' stories and a healthy dose of imagination, you've found the perfect listen with "Kids Short Stories."  Don't let your child's imaginative ideas stay untold! Tune in to "Kids Short Stories" and embark on a storytelling adventure where kids' stories come to life. Subscribe now and be part of a podcast that celebrates the power of children's creativity through mesmerizing kids' stories. title: Poly Styrene Read by Celeste Bell
podcast_name: Good Night Stories for Rebel Girls
summary: Poly Styrene, otherwise known as Marianne Joan Elliott-Said was a British musician, a poet, singer-songwriter, and a pioneer in punk music. She is the first multiracial woman to lead a punk band, and continually dared herself to evolve as a musician and human being.В  About the Narrator Celeste Bell spent her earliest years living on a Hare Krishna commune in the Hertfordshire countryside with her mother, Poly Styrene. After completing her degree from Queen Mary University of London, Celeste settled in Madrid where she worked as a teacher and formed the ska-punk band, Debutant Disco. After finishing a MasterвҖҷs degree in Barcelona, Celeste returned to London to work alongside ZoГ« Howe on Day Glo! The Poly Styrene Story, published by Omnibus Press in 2019. They then joined forces with Paul Sng to make Poly Styrene: I Am a ClichГ©, a film to accompany the book. Celeste currently manages her motherвҖҷs artistic estate, co-curating an exhibition alongside Mattie Loyce at the 198 Contemporary Arts and Learning Centre in Brixton. She plans to tour the exhibition internationally after the pandemic and is currently developing a new film project, with the working title of Mr. Gorbachev and the Krishna Kids. Credits This podcast is a production of Rebel Girls and is based on the book series Good Night Stories for Rebel Girls. This episode was produced by Camille Stennis. Original theme music and sound design by Elettra Bargiacchi and final mix by Mattia Marcelli. This episode was written by Abby Sher and fact checked by Joe Rhatigan. Executive Producer is Katie Sprenger. Haley Dapkus is our Production Manager. A big thanks to the whole Rebel Girls team who make this show possible! Until next time, stay REBEL! [This episode previously aired in 2021.]

title: Harlan Stuck In a Car Wash
podcast_name: Kids Short Stories: a Bedtime Show By Mr Jim
summary: Parents!Listen to this podcast, audiobooks and more on Storybutton, without your kids needing to use a screened device or your phone. Listen with no fees or subscriptions.вҖ”> Order Storybutton Today вҖ”  Sign Up For Kid Shout OutвҖҷs and Story SubmissionвҖҷshttps://heymrjim.com/story-submissionsFun Activities To Do At Home After Listeninghttps://heymrjim.com/activities-for-kidsAbout Mr. Jim:  Hi! I'm Jim Jacob, a South Carolina based creator. I started as a podcaster by accident. Our first real episodes on the internet were me trying to find a solution to help tell my sons stories as I was traveling for work. I recorded some stories and hoped that by uploading them to a podcast app, my wife and kids could have easy access to listen. What started as a fix for our familyвҖҷs bedtime routine interruption has grown into a worldwide audience with hundreds of thousands of listeners. My wife Jocelyn and I have 3 kids and love inspiring others towards greater imagination and curiosity.  Welcome to "Kids Short Stories," the unique podcast where your child's imagination becomes the star of the show! Dive into a world of adventure, mystery, and fun as Mr. Jim brings to life exhilarating tales inspired by story ideas submitted by kids from around the globe. Whether your child dreams up a story about space-traveling aliens, underwater adventures, or magical forests, "Kids Short Stories" transforms their creative sparks into captivating audio experiences.  Each episode of "Kids Short Stories" is a new journey, tailor-made for young listeners who love to explore, learn, and imagine. With a special emphasis on kids' stories, this podcast is not just entertainmentвҖ”it's a platform where children's voices and ideas lead the narrative. Listen as kids' stories about heroes, mythical creatures, and everyday challenges come to life, fostering a love for storytelling and enhancing listening skills.  "Kids Short Stories" is more than just a podcast; it's a community where children are encouraged to be creative and where their stories are valued and celebrated. By focusing on kids' stories, we aim to inspire a generation of young thinkers, dreamers, and storytellers. Join Mr. Jim every week for a new, exciting kids' story that ignites imagination and brings joy and laughter into your child's world.  Parents and educators love "Kids Short Stories" for its commitment to delivering engaging, thoughtful, and age-appropriate content. Each kids' story is crafted with care, ensuring that it's not only entertaining but also educational. If you're looking for a podcast that enriches your child's day with fantastic kids' stories and a healthy dose of imagination, you've found the perfect listen with "Kids Short Stories."  Don't let your child's imaginative ideas stay untold! Tune in to "Kids Short Stories" and embark on a storytelling adventure where kids' stories come to life. Subscribe now and be part of a podcast that celebrates the power of children's creativity through mesmerizing kids' stories. summary: Snowy Gnomes are quiet creatures who only gather once a month. The rest of the time, they happily keep to themselves вҖ” especially Snickery, who likes his peaceful, snowy routines just the way they are. But everything changes when Snickery discovers a lost elf shivering in the snow with a terrible cold. Kind-hearted Snickery offers him a cozy place to rest until heвҖҷs well again. ThereвҖҷs just one problem: the elf is cheerful, curious, and very talkative! As questions pile up and snowflakes fall, Snickery must decide whether to send his guest on his wayвҖ”or open his door (and his heart) to an unexpected new friendship. title: Skeleton and Cat Part 1
podcast_name: Kid Stories
summary: A talking skeleton and a clever cat escape giant dungeon rats in this action-packed fantasy adventure for kids ages 6-11. When a panicked cat hides behind a long-dead skeleton in the barrows, he discovers this particular skeleton can talk, and fight. Together they battle massive rats, help a wizard contain dangerous starlight, and face off against giant moths with horse-sized wingspans. With a rusty sword and quick thinking, this unlikely duo must survive their first day above ground in a world full of magic and danger. Perfect for car rides and bedtime listening when kids need screen-free entertainment that keeps them engaged. This humor-filled kids fantasy podcast delivers talking skeletons, giant monsters, and unlikely friendships that kids ages 6-11 will want to hear again and again. Skeleton's dry wit and Cat's sarcastic commentary make every dangerous situation entertaining. podcast_name: The Apple Seed
summary: Gather your family for great stories from great storytellers about Christmas memories. The Apple Seed is a storytelling podcast by BYUradio and is hosted by Sam Payne.

title: Sofia Climbs a Mountain
podcast_name: Kids Short Stories: a Bedtime Show By Mr Jim
summary: Parents!Listen to this podcast, audiobooks and more on Storybutton, without your kids needing to use a screened device or your phone. Listen with no fees or subscriptions.вҖ”> Order Storybutton Today вҖ”  Sign Up For Kid Shout OutвҖҷs and Story SubmissionвҖҷshttps://heymrjim.com/story-submissionsFun Activities To Do At Home After Listeninghttps://heymrjim.com/activities-for-kidsAbout Mr. Jim:  Hi! I'm Jim Jacob, a South Carolina based creator. I started as a podcaster by accident. Our first real episodes on the internet were me trying to find a solution to help tell my sons stories as I was traveling for work. I recorded some stories and hoped that by uploading them to a podcast app, my wife and kids could have easy access to listen. What started as a fix for our familyвҖҷs bedtime routine interruption has grown into a worldwide audience with hundreds of thousands of listeners. My wife Jocelyn and I have 3 kids and love inspiring others towards greater imagination and curiosity.  Welcome to "Kids Short Stories," the unique podcast where your child's imagination becomes the star of the show! Dive into a world of adventure, mystery, and fun as Mr. Jim brings to life exhilarating tales inspired by story ideas submitted by kids from around the globe. Whether your child dreams up a story about space-traveling aliens, underwater adventures, or magical forests, "Kids Short Stories" transforms their creative sparks into captivating audio experiences.  Each episode of "Kids Short Stories" is a new journey, tailor-made for young listeners who love to explore, learn, and imagine. With a special emphasis on kids' stories, this podcast is not just entertainmentвҖ”it's a platform where children's voices and ideas lead the narrative. Listen as kids' stories about heroes, mythical creatures, and everyday challenges come to life, fostering a love for storytelling and enhancing listening skills.  "Kids Short Stories" is more than just a podcast; it's a community where children are encouraged to be creative and where their stories are valued and celebrated. By focusing on kids' stories, we aim to inspire a generation of young thinkers, dreamers, and storytellers. Join Mr. Jim every week for a new, exciting kids' story that ignites imagination and brings joy and laughter into your child's world.  Parents and educators love "Kids Short Stories" for its commitment to delivering engaging, thoughtful, and age-appropriate content. Each kids' story is crafted with care, ensuring that it's not only entertaining but also educational. If you're looking for a podcast that enriches your child's day with fantastic kids' stories and a healthy dose of imagination, you've found the perfect listen with "Kids Short Stories."  Don't let your child's imaginative ideas stay untold! Tune in to "Kids Short Stories" and embark on a storytelling adventure where kids' stories come to life. Subscribe now and be part of a podcast that celebrates the power of children's creativity through mesmerizing kids' stories. I'm Jim Jacob, a South Carolina based creator. I started as a podcaster by accident. Our first real episodes on the internet were me trying to find a solution to help tell my sons stories as I was traveling for work. I recorded some stories and hoped that by uploading them to a podcast app, my wife and kids could have easy access to listen. What started as a fix for our familyвҖҷs bedtime routine interruption has grown into a worldwide audience with hundreds of thousands of listeners. My wife Jocelyn and I have 3 kids and love inspiring others towards greater imagination and curiosity.  Welcome to "Kids Short Stories," the unique podcast where your child's imagination becomes the star of the show! Dive into a world of adventure, mystery, and fun as Mr. Jim brings to life exhilarating tales inspired by story ideas submitted by kids from around the globe. Whether your child dreams up a story about space-traveling aliens, underwater adventures, or magical forests, "Kids Short Stories" transforms their creative sparks into captivating audio experiences.  Each episode of "Kids Short Stories" is a new journey, tailor-made for young listeners who love to explore, learn, and imagine. With a special emphasis on kids' stories, this podcast is not just entertainmentвҖ”it's a platform where children's voices and ideas lead the narrative. Listen as kids' stories about heroes, mythical creatures, and everyday challenges come to life, fostering a love for storytelling and enhancing listening skills.  "Kids Short Stories" is more than just a podcast; it's a community where children are encouraged to be creative and where their stories are valued and celebrated. By focusing on kids' stories, we aim to inspire a generation of young thinkers, dreamers, and storytellers. Join Mr. Jim every week for a new, exciting kids' story that ignites imagination and brings joy and laughter into your child's world.  Parents and educators love "Kids Short Stories" for its commitment to delivering engaging, thoughtful, and age-appropriate content. Each kids' story is crafted with care, ensuring that it's not only entertaining but also educational. If you're looking for a podcast that enriches your child's day with fantastic kids' stories and a healthy dose of imagination, you've found the perfect listen with "Kids Short Stories."  Don't let your child's imaginative ideas stay untold! Tune in to "Kids Short Stories" and embark on a storytelling adventure where kids' stories come to life. title: The Untold Story of Father Christmas: Part 1
podcast_name: Christmas Bedtime Stories from Lapland
summary: Before the world knew us as Father and Mother Christmas, there was only a toymaker and his kind-hearted wife, sharing joy one handmade toy at a time. On a snowy Christmas Eve long ago, a quiet act of giving sparked a tradition that would echo through generations. Settle in and discover the first flicker of magic that began it all - when love, wonder, and a wish to give changed everything.

title: Katie Ledecky: Breaking Records and Swimming to the Top
podcast_name: Good Night Stories for Rebel Girls
summary: Katie Ledecky dove headfirst into swimming at just six years old. Today, she is now the most decorated woman swimmer in Olympic history. From winning her first gold in the 800m freestyle at 15 years old to having a current-day total of 14 Olympic medals, Katie continues to prove that she is limitless in the water.В  This podcast is a production of Rebel Girls. ItвҖҷs based on the book series Good Night Stories for Rebel Girls. This episode was narrated by Tara Kirk Sell. It was written and produced by Danielle Roth, and edited and directed by Haley Dapkus. Sound design and mixing by Mumble Media.В  Fact checking by Sam Gebauer. Our production coordinator was Natalie Hara. Haley Dapkus was our senior producer. Our executive producers were Anjelika Temple and Jes Wolfe. Original theme music was composed and performed by Elettra Bargiacchi. A special thanks to the whole Rebel Girls team, who make this podcast possible! Until next time, stay rebel!

podcast_name: Sleep Tight Relax - Calming Bedtime Stories and Meditations
summary: In tonight's story, we're sharing an old classic that first appeared in 1850, written by the famous author Charles Dickens. Dickens is known for many wonderful works, including A Christmas Carol, and his stories often capture the magic and spirit of the holidays. This story, called A Christmas Tree, takes us on a journey through Christmas memories filled with imagination and the joy of togetherness. While the original story is quite long and written in the style of its time, we've adapted it to be shorter and more accessible for bedtime.
