title: Grandpa's Magical RV
podcast_name: Kids Short Stories: a Bedtime Show By Mr Jim
summary: Parents!Listen to this podcast, audiobooks and more on Storybutton, without your kids needing to use a screened device or your phone. Listen with no fees or subscriptions.вҖ”> Order Storybutton Today вҖ”  Sign Up For Kid Shout OutвҖҷs and Story SubmissionвҖҷshttps://heymrjim.com/story-submissionsFun Activities To Do At Home After Listeninghttps://heymrjim.com/activities-for-kidsAbout Mr. Jim:  Hi! I'm Jim Jacob, a South Carolina based creator. I started as a podcaster by accident. Our first real episodes on the internet were me trying to find a solution to help tell my sons stories as I was traveling for work. I recorded some stories and hoped that by uploading them to a podcast app, my wife and kids could have easy access to listen. What started as a fix for our familyвҖҷs bedtime routine interruption has grown into a worldwide audience with hundreds of thousands of listeners. My wife Jocelyn and I have 3 kids and love inspiring others towards greater imagination and curiosity.  Welcome to "Kids Short Stories," the unique podcast where your child's imagination becomes the star of the show! Dive into a world of adventure, mystery, and fun as Mr. Jim brings to life exhilarating tales inspired by story ideas submitted by kids from around the globe. Whether your child dreams up a story about space-traveling aliens, underwater adventures, or magical forests, "Kids Short Stories" transforms their creative sparks into captivating audio experiences.  Each episode of "Kids Short Stories" is a new journey, tailor-made for young listeners who love to explore, learn, and imagine. With a special emphasis on kids' stories, this podcast is not just entertainmentвҖ”it's a platform where children's voices and ideas lead the narrative. Listen as kids' stories about heroes, mythical creatures, and everyday challenges come to life, fostering a love for storytelling and enhancing listening skills.  "Kids Short Stories" is more than just a podcast; it's a community where children are encouraged to be creative and where their stories are valued and celebrated. By focusing on kids' stories, we aim to inspire a generation of young thinkers, dreamers, and storytellers. Join Mr. Jim every week for a new, exciting kids' story that ignites imagination and brings joy and laughter into your child's world.  Parents and educators love "Kids Short Stories" for its commitment to delivering engaging, thoughtful, and age-appropriate content. Each kids' story is crafted with care, ensuring that it's not only entertaining but also educational. If you're looking for a podcast that enriches your child's day with fantastic kids' stories and a healthy dose of imagination, you've found the perfect listen with "Kids Short Stories."  Don't let your child's imaginative ideas stay untold! Tune in to "Kids Short Stories" and embark on a storytelling adventure where kids' stories come to life. Subscribe now and be part of a podcast that celebrates the power of children's creativity through mesmerizing kids' stories. Whether youвҖҷre in the car, at home, or on the go, every seat is the best seat for music, laughter, and big Nick Jr. fun.

title: Light the World - Christmas Time Acts of Service Stories from Our Appleseed Storytellers
podcast_name: The Apple Seed
summary: In this special episode, we are celebrating the spirit of Christmas. The Appleseed is brought to you by BYUradio which is sponsored by The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints. Each year The Church sponsors a worldwide campaign, called Light the World, focused on serving others during the holidays. We reached out to the storytellers you know and love from the Appleseed to have them share the acts of service that have impacted their lives. These storytellers include (00:00) Intro (01:40) Kim Weitkamp (05:45) Tim Lowry (09:44) Antonio Sacre (11:45) Sam Payne (17:23) Bil Lepp (19:27) Sheila Arnold We hope these stories help you think of the ways you can reach out during this holiday season. As well as, spark memories of Christmas time service that you can share with the people you love. You can visit lighttheworld.org for ideas and opportunities that can help you experience the joy of helping others at Christmas time. The Apple Seed is a storytelling podcast by BYUradio and is hosted by Sam Payne.

summary: Parents!Listen to this podcast, audiobooks and more on Storybutton, without your kids needing to use a screened device or your phone. Listen with no fees or subscriptions.вҖ”> Order Storybutton Today вҖ”  Sign Up For Kid Shout OutвҖҷs and Story SubmissionвҖҷshttps://heymrjim.com/story-submissionsFun Activities To Do At Home After Listeninghttps://heymrjim.com/activities-for-kidsAbout Mr. Jim:  Hi! I'm Jim Jacob, a South Carolina based creator. I started as a podcaster by accident. Our first real episodes on the internet were me trying to find a solution to help tell my sons stories as I was traveling for work. I recorded some stories and hoped that by uploading them to a podcast app, my wife and kids could have easy access to listen. What started as a fix for our familyвҖҷs bedtime routine interruption has grown into a worldwide audience with hundreds of thousands of listeners. My wife Jocelyn and I have 3 kids and love inspiring others towards greater imagination and curiosity.  Welcome to "Kids Short Stories," the unique podcast where your child's imagination becomes the star of the show! Dive into a world of adventure, mystery, and fun as Mr. Jim brings to life exhilarating tales inspired by story ideas submitted by kids from around the globe. Whether your child dreams up a story about space-traveling aliens, underwater adventures, or magical forests, "Kids Short Stories" transforms their creative sparks into captivating audio experiences.  Each episode of "Kids Short Stories" is a new journey, tailor-made for young listeners who love to explore, learn, and imagine. With a special emphasis on kids' stories, this podcast is not just entertainmentвҖ”it's a platform where children's voices and ideas lead the narrative. Listen as kids' stories about heroes, mythical creatures, and everyday challenges come to life, fostering a love for storytelling and enhancing listening skills.  "Kids Short Stories" is more than just a podcast; it's a community where children are encouraged to be creative and where their stories are valued and celebrated. By focusing on kids' stories, we aim to inspire a generation of young thinkers, dreamers, and storytellers. Join Mr. Jim every week for a new, exciting kids' story that ignites imagination and brings joy and laughter into your child's world.  Parents and educators love "Kids Short Stories" for its commitment to delivering engaging, thoughtful, and age-appropriate content. Each kids' story is crafted with care, ensuring that it's not only entertaining but also educational. If you're looking for a podcast that enriches your child's day with fantastic kids' stories and a healthy dose of imagination, you've found the perfect listen with "Kids Short Stories."  Don't let your child's imaginative ideas stay untold! Tune in to "Kids Short Stories" and embark on a storytelling adventure where kids' stories come to life. Subscribe now and be part of a podcast that celebrates the power of children's creativity through mesmerizing kids' stories. Dans cet Г©pisode, on vous raconte lвҖҷhistoire du Sapin. Un conte de NoГ«l Г©crit par Hans Christian Andersen publiГ© en 1844. Bonne Г©coute.

title: Downton AbbeyвҖҷs Hugh Bonneville Reveals the Story Behind the Spark вңЁрҹ“ҡ

summary: Welcome to the latest episode of Book Worms!  Brian Bilston brings his signature wit and wordplay with A Poem for Every Question, a clever and surprising collection that will make readers laugh, think, and see the world in a new way.  Julie Sykes whisks us away on a cosmic adventure in Luna Grace: Girl from Outer Space, a fun and heartfelt story filled with bravery, friendship, and plenty of starry excitement.  Emma Carroll offers a darkly funny twist on a classic tale with Dracula & Daughters, packed with surprises, humour, and a fresh take on familiar fangs.  And TV legend Hugh Bonneville shares warmth and charm in Rory Sparkes & The Elephant in the Room, a moving story about big feelings, empathy, and finding your spark.  That's all on this week's episode of Fun Kids Book Worms! Join Fun Kids Podcasts+: https://funkidslive.com/plus See omnystudio.com/listener for privacy information.

title: The Golden Seed Part 8 - The Giant Cats
podcast_name: Kid Stories
summary: Giant cats defeat a kraken and recover the Golden Seed in the epic finale of this eight-episode kids adventure story for ages 6-11. When horse-sized Whiskers, Mittens, Shadow, Ranger, and Spark battle the massive sea monster through dangerous swamps, three young heroes chase the fleeing Red Cloak wizard on cat-back. Nina and Miles execute a perfect aerial tackle, capturing the enemy and finally securing the precious seed they've pursued across land and sea. Planting the Golden Seed on a beautiful beach, they witness impossible magic as an entire forest grows instantlyвҖ”miles of trees erupting from sand and ocean floor in spectacular fashion. But the seed's rebirth brings an unexpected surprise that changes everything. This action-packed kids fantasy podcast delivers giant animal battles, magical forest creation, and a mysterious finale perfect for car rides and screen-free entertainment. This thrilling kids adventure podcast brings epic conclusions, transformation magic wearing off, and revelations about Avaya's mysterious birthmark that kids ages 6-11 will want to hear again and again. title: Henry and Carolina Save The Gummy Vitamins
podcast_name: Kids Short Stories: a Bedtime Show By Mr Jim
summary: Parents!Listen to this podcast, audiobooks and more on Storybutton, without your kids needing to use a screened device or your phone. Listen with no fees or subscriptions.вҖ”> Order Storybutton Today вҖ”  Sign Up For Kid Shout OutвҖҷs and Story SubmissionвҖҷshttps://heymrjim.com/story-submissionsFun Activities To Do At Home After Listeninghttps://heymrjim.com/activities-for-kidsAbout Mr. Jim:  Hi! I'm Jim Jacob, a South Carolina based creator. I started as a podcaster by accident. Our first real episodes on the internet were me trying to find a solution to help tell my sons stories as I was traveling for work. I recorded some stories and hoped that by uploading them to a podcast app, my wife and kids could have easy access to listen. What started as a fix for our familyвҖҷs bedtime routine interruption has grown into a worldwide audience with hundreds of thousands of listeners. My wife Jocelyn and I have 3 kids and love inspiring others towards greater imagination and curiosity.  Welcome to "Kids Short Stories," the unique podcast where your child's imagination becomes the star of the show! Dive into a world of adventure, mystery, and fun as Mr. Jim brings to life exhilarating tales inspired by story ideas submitted by kids from around the globe. Whether your child dreams up a story about space-traveling aliens, underwater adventures, or magical forests, "Kids Short Stories" transforms their creative sparks into captivating audio experiences.  Each episode of "Kids Short Stories" is a new journey, tailor-made for young listeners who love to explore, learn, and imagine. With a special emphasis on kids' stories, this podcast is not just entertainmentвҖ”it's a platform where children's voices and ideas lead the narrative. Listen as kids' stories about heroes, mythical creatures, and everyday challenges come to life, fostering a love for storytelling and enhancing listening skills.  "Kids Short Stories" is more than just a podcast; it's a community where children are encouraged to be creative and where their stories are valued and celebrated. By focusing on kids' stories, we aim to inspire a generation of young thinkers, dreamers, and storytellers. Join Mr. Jim every week for a new, exciting kids' story that ignites imagination and brings joy and laughter into your child's world.  Parents and educators love "Kids Short Stories" for its commitment to delivering engaging, thoughtful, and age-appropriate content. Each kids' story is crafted with care, ensuring that it's not only entertaining but also educational. If you're looking for a podcast that enriches your child's day with fantastic kids' stories and a healthy dose of imagination, you've found the perfect listen with "Kids Short Stories."  Don't let your child's imaginative ideas stay untold! Tune in to "Kids Short Stories" and embark on a storytelling adventure where kids' stories come to life. Subscribe now and be part of a podcast that celebrates the power of children's creativity through mesmerizing kids' stories. Our first real episodes on the internet were me trying to find a solution to help tell my sons stories as I was traveling for work. Welcome to "Bedtime Stories," the enchanting podcast where Mr. Jim weaves gentle tales to accompany your child into dreamland. "Bedtime Stories" is specifically crafted with bedtime stories for kids in mind, ensuring that each tale is calming, uplifting, and filled with positive messages. The stories are perfect for creating a peaceful environment, helping kids transition from the day's excitement into peaceful slumber. Listeners will find a diverse collection of bedtime stories for kids, each designed to spark imagination while instilling a sense of tranquility. I'm Jim Jacob, a South Carolina based creator. I started as a podcaster by accident. Our first real episodes on the internet were me trying to find a solution to help tell my sons stories as I was traveling for work. I recorded some stories and hoped that by uploading them to a podcast app, my wife and kids could have easy access to listen. What started as a fix for our familyвҖҷs bedtime routine interruption has grown into a worldwide audience with hundreds of thousands of listeners. My wife Jocelyn and I have 3 kids and love inspiring others towards greater imagination and curiosity.  Welcome to "Kids Short Stories," the unique podcast where your child's imagination becomes the star of the show! Dive into a world of adventure, mystery, and fun as Mr. Jim brings to life exhilarating tales inspired by story ideas submitted by kids from around the globe. Whether your child dreams up a story about space-traveling aliens, underwater adventures, or magical forests, "Kids Short Stories" transforms their creative sparks into captivating audio experiences.  Each episode of "Kids Short Stories" is a new journey, tailor-made for young listeners who love to explore, learn, and imagine. With a special emphasis on kids' stories, this podcast is not just entertainmentвҖ”it's a platform where children's voices and ideas lead the narrative. Listen as kids' stories about heroes, mythical creatures, and everyday challenges come to life, fostering a love for storytelling and enhancing listening skills.  "Kids Short Stories" is more than just a podcast; it's a community where children are encouraged to be creative and where their stories are valued and celebrated. By focusing on kids' stories, we aim to inspire a generation of young thinkers, dreamers, and storytellers. Join Mr. Jim every week for a new, exciting kids' story that ignites imagination and brings joy and laughter into your child's world.  Parents and educators love "Kids Short Stories" for its commitment to delivering engaging, thoughtful, and age-appropriate content. Each kids' story is crafted with care, ensuring that it's not only entertaining but also educational. If you're looking for a podcast that enriches your child's day with fantastic kids' stories and a healthy dose of imagination, you've found the perfect listen with "Kids Short Stories."  Don't let your child's imaginative ideas stay untold! Tune in to "Kids Short Stories" and embark on a storytelling adventure where kids' stories come to life. Subscribe now and be part of a podcast that celebrates the power of children's creativity through mesmerizing kids' stories. title: The Golden Seed Part 7 - Old Witch Toobs
podcast_name: Kid Stories
summary: An ancient witch holds the key to defeating the Red Cloaks in this strategic kids adventure story for ages 6-11. When Avaya and the ninjas visit Old Witch Toobs in the mysterious Rock Fields, the tiny but powerful sorceress immediately senses forest magic on Nina and Miles. After hearing about the stolen Golden Seed and the failed raid on the Red Cloak hideout, Toobs insists on joining the missionвҖ”bringing centuries of experience fighting evil wizards. The group launches a coordinated assault on the Southern Swamps with Toobs providing devastating magical support. But even with the ancient witch's power, the Red Cloak captain's enchanted staff and pocket kraken drive them back. When Master Momo barely escapes with his life and the seed remains in enemy hands, Toobs begins forming a desperate new plan. This action-packed kids fantasy podcast delivers swamp battles and ancient magic perfect for car rides and screen-free entertainment. This thrilling kids adventure podcast brings legendary witches, coordinated ninja attacks, and impossible odds that kids ages 6-11 will want to hear again and again. title: Pixie Dust Fuss - Tinkerbell Fairy Story for Kids
podcast_name: Dorktales Storytime
summary: Send us a text Jonathan and Redge come home in the middle of the day to find that the Folktale Forest folk are fast asleep and no one can wake them up! The mystery leads to Tinkerbell, whoвҖҷs created a pixie dust harvesting mix-up of magical proportions. In an attempt to fix things, she borrowed a bit of stardust and accidentally sent all of Once Upon a Time into a super-deep slumber. Determined to make things right, she and her friends put their clever tinkering skills to work, turning the seasonвҖҷs first snowfall into an enchanted wake-up call. Go to the episode webpage: https://jonincharacter.com/pixie-dust-fuss/В  GRAB YOUR FREE PDF list of conversation questions for this episode:   https://dorktalesstorytime.aweb.page/ep124freePDFВ  PARENTS, TEACHERS AND HOMESCHOOLERS: In Pixie Dust Fuss, TinkerbellвҖҷs earnest intentions to fix a problem goes awry puts the entire land into a deep slumber. Through her journey to set things right kids learn about responsibility, problem-solving, and the importance of asking for help when things go wrong. The story highlights how mistakes can become meaningful learning moments when approached with openness and honesty. IF YOU ENJOYED THIS STORY about a fairy, youвҖҷll also enjoy this story about Hesper, the Fairy of the Evening Star, in episode 75: Once Upon a Lullaby: https://jonincharacter.com/once-upon-a-lullaby/В  В  CREDITS: This episode is a Jonincharacter production. title: Husky Heroes To The Rescue!
podcast_name: Christmas Bedtime Stories from Lapland
summary: When a mighty snowstorm buries Lapland and traps the reindeer inside their stables, Christmas preparations come to a sudden halt!  With Glow the Elf snowed in and no way to reach the magical moss meadow, only one team can save the day - the fearless and furry Husky Heroes.  Join Father Christmas and Pupkin as six determined huskies dig their way to victory in a race against the snow to rescue Christmas!

title: Margarete Steiff: Made with Love
podcast_name: Good Night Stories for Rebel Girls
summary: With a needle, a bit of stuffing and a lot of creativity, inventor Margarete Steiff stitched one of the most beloved toys into existence: the teddy bear. She turned her passion into a business forever changing the way children go to sleep. This podcast is a production of Rebel Girls. ItвҖҷs based on the book series Good Night Stories for Rebel Girls. This story was produced by Olivia RiГ§hard with sound design and mixing by Mumble Media. It was written by Abby Sher. Fact-checking by Joe Rhatigan. Narration by Jenise Morgan. Original theme music was composed and performed by Elettra Bargiacchi. Thank you to the whole Rebel Girls team who make this podcast possible. Stay rebel!

title: The Golden Seed Part 6 - The Ninjas of Valleytown
podcast_name: Kid Stories
summary: Exhausted heroes discover legendary goofballs and meet elite ninjas in this delicious kids adventure story for ages 6-11. When Avaya, Nina, and Miles stumble into Hooper's magical candy shop, they're treated to the valley's most famous confection while sharing their tale of the stolen Golden Seed. The friendly shopkeeper directs them to the Ninjas of ValleytownвҖ”defenders who've been fighting the evil Red Cloak Wizard Tribe for years. At the ninja dojo, the cat-obsessed warrior Booleese immediately befriends the five felines while Master Momo and his team listen to the heroes' story. Learning the Red Cloaks operate from the Southern Swamps, the ninjas agree to helpвҖ”but first they must visit Old Witch Toobs, who knows more about magical artifacts than anyone alive. This action-packed kids fantasy podcast delivers candy shop discoveries and ninja allies perfect for car rides and screen-free entertainment. This thrilling kids adventure podcast brings legendary sweets, elite warriors, and powerful allies that kids ages 6-11 will want to hear again and again. title: The Day the Christmas Clock Froze: Christmas Bedtime Stories
podcast_name: Christmas Bedtime Stories from Lapland
summary: When a single drip of melted snow hits Father Christmas in the eye, it uncovers a shocking truth - the great 'Sleeps Until Christmas' clock has frozen on the wrong number!  Suddenly, what seemed like a peaceful day in Lapland turns into a toy-making emergency, as every Elf is called back from skating on the frozen pond to save Christmas in time.  Join Father Christmas, Whittle, and even the sleepy cuckoo as they race against time in the most unexpected winter adventure!

I'm Jim Jacob, a South Carolina based creator. I started as a podcaster by accident. Our first real episodes on the internet were me trying to find a solution to help tell my sons stories as I was traveling for work. I recorded some stories and hoped that by uploading them to a podcast app, my wife and kids could have easy access to listen. What started as a fix for our familyвҖҷs bedtime routine interruption has grown into a worldwide audience with hundreds of thousands of listeners. My wife Jocelyn and I have 3 kids and love inspiring others towards greater imagination and curiosity.  Welcome to "Kids Short Stories," the unique podcast where your child's imagination becomes the star of the show! Dive into a world of adventure, mystery, and fun as Mr. Jim brings to life exhilarating tales inspired by story ideas submitted by kids from around the globe. Whether your child dreams up a story about space-traveling aliens, underwater adventures, or magical forests, "Kids Short Stories" transforms their creative sparks into captivating audio experiences.  Each episode of "Kids Short Stories" is a new journey, tailor-made for young listeners who love to explore, learn, and imagine. With a special emphasis on kids' stories, this podcast is not just entertainmentвҖ”it's a platform where children's voices and ideas lead the narrative. Listen as kids' stories about heroes, mythical creatures, and everyday challenges come to life, fostering a love for storytelling and enhancing listening skills.  "Kids Short Stories" is more than just a podcast; it's a community where children are encouraged to be creative and where their stories are valued and celebrated. By focusing on kids' stories, we aim to inspire a generation of young thinkers, dreamers, and storytellers. Join Mr. Jim every week for a new, exciting kids' story that ignites imagination and brings joy and laughter into your child's world.  Parents and educators love "Kids Short Stories" for its commitment to delivering engaging, thoughtful, and age-appropriate content. Each kids' story is crafted with care, ensuring that it's not only entertaining but also educational. If you're looking for a podcast that enriches your child's day with fantastic kids' stories and a healthy dose of imagination, you've found the perfect listen with "Kids Short Stories."  Don't let your child's imaginative ideas stay untold! Tune in to "Kids Short Stories" and embark on a storytelling adventure where kids' stories come to life. Subscribe now and be part of a podcast that celebrates the power of children's creativity through mesmerizing kids' stories. title: The Golden Seed Part 5 - The Red Cloak
podcast_name: Kid Stories
summary: A wizard riding a kraken attacks a pirate ship at dawn in this spectacular kids adventure story for ages 6-11. After sailing all night to catch the vessel carrying the Golden Seed, Avaya, Nina, and Miles watch in shock as a figure in a red cloak commands a massive sea monster to destroy the pirates. Tentacles crush the ship's cabin and carefully extract the seed while the mysterious wizard smiles directly at the young heroes watching from their small sailboat. Following the kraken to shore, they discover it shrinks to pocket-size with a simple potion before the wizard disappears into a beautiful hidden valley. The exhausted travelers find themselves in unfamiliar territory, far beyond their maps, tracking an enemy with powerful magic and dangerous creatures. This action-packed kids fantasy podcast delivers kraken battles and mysterious valleys perfect for car rides and screen-free entertainment. This thrilling kids adventure podcast brings sea monster attacks, shrinking potions, and relentless pursuit that kids ages 6-11 will want to hear again and again. title: S12 E6: Forbidden Holiday Fun - Stories for the Whole Family by Kim Weitkamp
podcast_name: The Apple Seed
summary: Gather your family for great stories from great storytellers about some winter adventures, forbidden fun, and stretching of tales to preposterous proportions. (01:21) "The Forbidden Souped-up Sled Ride" - Kim Weitkamp tells a story about a time when her Uncle Norm fixed up her broken sled and added a Jet Propulsion engine. Which led to an unexpected flight over her small town. (19:07) Sam tells a story about the Klondike Derby, where his Boy Scout group built sleds to to race against other Boy Scout troop during their winter campout. (22:47) "Let's Go Sledding" - Sam Payne accompanies Kim Weitkamp to sing a song about sledding. Stories bring us together and the stories on The Apple Seed will spark memories that you can share with the people you love. The Apple Seed is a storytelling podcast by BYUradio and is hosted by Sam Payne.

title: The Dragon Princess and the Elemental Dragon - Dragon Knights #10 - A Bedtime Adventure
podcast_name: DadвҖҷs Bedtime Stories For Kids
summary: In this episode, we learn the story of Autumn - The Dragon King's daughter. Raised as the heir to the thrown, and trained in all of the Dragon King's spells, including the control spell, Autumn became a force to be reckoned with. Once she was old enough, her father allowed her to have a dragon of her own. The plan was to have her use the control spell to take over the dragon's mind, but that didn't turn out to be necessary, as somehow, she bonded with the dragon naturally. Will she follow the way of her father, or choose a different path? About the Dragon Knights - In a world taken over by the Dragon King, the only hope is for a new group of dragon knights to find and link with dragon eggs. You happen to be one of those knights! Each dragon has a connection to an element, and each Dragon Knight can command that same element. title: The Golden Seed Part 4 - Saltmere Harbor
podcast_name: Kid Stories
summary: Dragon rage unleashes chaos on Saltmere Harbor when Barnabus spots the pirates who destroyed his collection in this explosive adventure story for kids ages 6-11. Three young heroes race down the ridge on a rescue mission, but the enraged moss dragon attacks before they can form a planвҖ”breathing fire, smashing docks, and battling an entire pirate crew. When flames consume ships and harbor guards join the fight, Avaya, Nina, and Miles must find the Golden Seed before everything burns. The seed changes hands in spectacular fashion when a trained parrot snatches it mid-battle and flies toward a massive pirate ship on the horizon. The kids steal a sailboat and chase into open ocean, sailing through the night toward an unknown enemy. This action-packed kids fantasy podcast delivers dock-destroying dragon battles and desperate sea chases perfect for car rides and screen-free entertainment. This thrilling kids adventure podcast brings fire-breathing mayhem, nautical pursuits, and non-stop danger that kids ages 6-11 will want to hear again and again. summary: Parents!Listen to this podcast, audiobooks and more on Storybutton, without your kids needing to use a screened device or your phone. Listen with no fees or subscriptions.вҖ”> Order Storybutton Today вҖ”  Hello friends, are you getting ready for bed?LetвҖҷs make sure weвҖҷve brushed our teeth and washed our hands. Oh and donвҖҷt forget your comfy things. Now itвҖҷs time for the perfect bedtime story.  About Mr. Jim:  Hi! I'm Jim Jacob, a South Carolina based creator. I started as a podcaster by accident. Our first real episodes on the internet were me trying to find a solution to help tell my sons stories as I was traveling for work. I recorded some stories and hoped that by uploading them to a podcast app, my wife and kids could have easy access to listen. What started as a fix for our familyвҖҷs bedtime routine interruption has grown into a worldwide audience with hundreds of thousands of listeners. My wife Jocelyn and I have 3 kids and love inspiring others towards greater imagination and curiosity.  Welcome to "Bedtime Stories," the enchanting podcast where Mr. Jim weaves gentle tales to accompany your child into dreamland. Immerse your little ones in a soothing auditory experience, designed to transport them to a world of calm and wonder at bedtime. "Bedtime Stories" is not just a show; it's a nightly ritual, where kids can unwind with stories that sparkle with magic, kindness, and gentle adventure. Every episode of "Bedtime Stories" offers a tranquil escape, helping children relax, wind down, and prepare for a restful night's sleep. With a focus on bedtime stories for kids, Mr. Jim's soothing voice and imaginative narratives are the perfect companions for your child's journey to the land of dreams. Bedtime stories for kids are an age-old tradition, and this podcast brings that tradition into the 21st century, blending timeless storytelling with the convenience of modern technology.  "Bedtime Stories" is specifically crafted with bedtime stories for kids in mind, ensuring that each tale is calming, uplifting, and filled with positive messages. The stories are perfect for creating a peaceful environment, helping kids transition from the day's excitement into peaceful slumber. With bedtime stories for kids at its heart, the podcast stands as an invaluable tool for parents looking to establish a comforting bedtime routine.  Listeners will find a diverse collection of bedtime stories for kids, each designed to spark imagination while instilling a sense of tranquility. Whether it's tales of gentle creatures, whispering forests, or starlit skies, "Bedtime Stories" ensures that every child drifts off to sleep feeling safe, loved, and content. The focus on bedtime stories for kids makes this podcast a treasure trove of dreamy narratives that enchant and soothe.  Join Mr. Jim nightly for "Bedtime Stories," where bedtime stories for kids come alive in a symphony of calm and serenity. Subscribe to the podcast and make "Bedtime Stories" an integral part of your child's bedtime ritual, where the day ends with the gentle embrace of a story, ensuring sweet dreams and a restful night. With "Bedtime Stories," bedtime becomes a magical time, filled with stories that whisper goodnight to your child, one tale at a time. I'm Jim Jacob, a South Carolina based creator. I started as a podcaster by accident. Our first real episodes on the internet were me trying to find a solution to help tell my sons stories as I was traveling for work. I recorded some stories and hoped that by uploading them to a podcast app, my wife and kids could have easy access to listen. What started as a fix for our familyвҖҷs bedtime routine interruption has grown into a worldwide audience with hundreds of thousands of listeners. My wife Jocelyn and I have 3 kids and love inspiring others towards greater imagination and curiosity.  Welcome to "Kids Animal Stories," the captivating kids podcast where education meets entertainment through the exploration of the animal kingdom. Hosted by the engaging Mr. Jim, this show takes young listeners on thrilling adventures into the wild, diving deep into the lives of animals from every corner of the globe. Each episode of this kids podcast is a journey, rich with learning opportunities and fun facts that spark curiosity and foster a love for nature.  "Kids Animal Stories" is the perfect kids podcast for young animal enthusiasts eager to learn about the natural world. Through immersive storytelling, Mr. Jim brings to life the fascinating behaviors, habitats, and conservation stories of animals, making each episode an educational expedition. With a focus on being a kids podcast, it provides a platform where children can not only listen but also engage with the content, learning about the environment and the importance of caring for our planet.  As a leading kids podcast in the realm of educational entertainment, "Kids Animal Stories" combines factual information with engaging narratives, making learning about animals exciting and memorable. Whether your child is interested in the deep sea, the jungle, or their own backyard, this kids podcast delivers stories that captivate and educate, sparking a lifelong interest in wildlife and conservation.  Parents and educators value "Kids Animal Stories" as a resourceful kids podcast that complements learning with fun. Each episode is thoughtfully crafted, ensuring that the content is not only informative but also suitable for children of all ages. As a trusted kids podcast, it's an excellent way for children to expand their knowledge and understanding of the world around them, all through the power of storytelling.  Subscribe to "Kids Animal Stories" and join Mr. Jim on this exciting kids podcast, where each episode is an adventure waiting to happen. Ignite your child's passion for learning and their love for animals with this engaging kids podcast, where every story is an opportunity to learn something new about our planet's incredible wildlife. "Kids Animal Stories" is more than just a kids podcastвҖ”it's a window to the world, opening young minds to the wonders of the animal kingdom, one story at a time.
